description: The practice has completed its quarterly quality review. The findings are documented in /home/ga/Desktop/quality_review.txt. This file lists 6 patients with identified care gaps. For each flagged patient, address ALL identified deficiencies: if a diagnosed condition is missing from the problem list, add it with the correct ICD-10 code; if a prescribed medication is missing or has an incorrect dosage, add or correct it; if a known allergy is undocumented, add it with the reaction and severity; if the patient is overdue for a follow-up visit, schedule an appointment with Dr. James Carter. For each patient where you make changes, create an encounter note documenting what was remediated and why. Two of the six patients have already been remediated -- verify their charts are complete but do NOT make any changes. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!).
